payload.message:
You are reviewing progress on the tutor-agent-bot project for Nikhil (project manager).

STEPS:
1. Clone or update the repo:
   If /data/workspace/tutor-agent-bot exists: cd /data/workspace/tutor-agent-bot && git pull
   Otherwise: git clone https://github.com/Jordanm37/tutor-agent-bot /data/workspace/tutor-agent-bot

2. Get recent commits (last 7 days):
   git -C /data/workspace/tutor-agent-bot log --oneline --since='7 days ago'

3. Get open PRs and issues:
   gh pr list --repo Jordanm37/tutor-agent-bot --state all --limit 10
   gh issue list --repo Jordanm37/tutor-agent-bot --state all --limit 10

4. Read docs/SPEC.md and README.md for project context

5. Check for stale branches, failing tests, open TODOs

OUTPUT: Write a progress report to /data/workspace/tutor-agent-bot/docs/PROGRESS.md

Format:
# tutor-agent-bot Progress Report
**Generated:** <date>
**Period:** Last 7 days

## Summary
2-3 sentence overview

## Recent Commits
List with dates and messages

## Open Issues / PRs
Status of each

## Blockers / Risks
Anything stalled or at risk

## Next Steps
What should happen next based on the spec

Then commit and push:
  cd /data/workspace/tutor-agent-bot
  git add docs/PROGRESS.md
  git commit -m 'chore: weekly progress report'
  git push

DELIVERY: Send TWO Telegram messages with the same content:
1. To chatId 8307133610 (Nikhil)
2. To chatId 1105159240 (Jordan)

Each message should contain:
- 3-5 bullet summary of the week
- Link: https://github.com/Jordanm37/tutor-agent-bot/blob/main/docs/PROGRESS.md

Finally: reply exactly NO_REPLY
